data.content: Implemented configurable max concurrent sessions on branch impl/foolery-5fc1. Added maxConcurrentSessions (1-20, default 5) to the settings schema. Exposed as a number input in Settings > Defaults tab. Beats page reads the value via a ['settings'] React Query (staleTime 30s) and the settings sheet invalidates this query on save, fixing the stale-cache issue from the prior rejected implementation. Terminal-manager reads from loadSettings() (30s TTL cache). All quality gates pass: 150 test files (2096 tests), tsc --noEmit, lint (pre-existing warnings only), build. Commit: ab19e0fb1dff.
